name: Louisburg City Park Tennis Court
description: This court features one tennis court that also has pickle ball lines and two drawn out courts for bring-your-own-net play. If a tennis match is in play, there is no room for using any of the pickle ball courts. During late summer and fall, you may wish to bring a blower or broom to clear the leaves and acorns from the playing surface.
open_play_schedule: During the summer a welcoming group typically plays MWF 7-9AM.

name: Osawatomie City Auditorium
description: Osawatomie City Auditorium is a place to play pickleball in Osawatomie, KS. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Must Reserve auditorium / Contact Utility Office
